title: Peripherals Not Working
drDigitalIntro:
Peripherals are devices you plug in — keyboard, mouse, printer, headphones.
• If one stops working, first check the cable or wireless connection.
• Unplug it and plug it back in — that fixes most USB issues.
• If wireless, check the battery or try turning Bluetooth off and on.
• Still stuck? Restart your computer so it can detect the device again.
• For printers, open your Settings and check the Printers section — it shows whether the computer can see it.
drDigitalSuccess: Now you know the steps: check the connection, unplug/replug, restart. Most peripheral problems are that simple!
drDigitalHint: Just read along and click Continue when you're ready.
